dl_groups.description: Core Payments Engineering team distribution list. All team announcements and discussions.

email_template.subject: New Team Member - {developer_name} joining Payments Engineering
email_template.body:
Hi {owner_name},

Please add {developer_name} (email: {developer_email}) to the {dl_name} distribution list.

They are joining the Payments Engineering team on {start_date}.

Thanks,
Onboarding Buddy

dl_groups.description: Receives automated alerts, incident notifications, and on-call pages for payment systems.

email_template.subject: DL Subscription Request - {developer_name} for Payments Alerts
email_template.body:
Hi {owner_name},

Please subscribe {developer_name} ({developer_email}) to the Payments Alerts distribution list.

Start date: {start_date}

Thanks,
Onboarding Buddy
